title: What Scripture Actually Says About Humility (It's Not What You Think)
caption:
You've had humility wrong the whole time.

Most men think it means thinking less of yourself. Announcing your failures. Shrinking. Scripture teaches something completely different.

C.S. Lewis had it right: humility is not thinking less of yourself, it is thinking of yourself less. The humble man isn't insecure — he's so secure in Christ that he doesn't need anyone to notice him at all.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6.

The man who doesn't need approval can't be controlled by it. The man who doesn't need credit can give everything away.

And humble and strong are not opposites. Jesus cleared the temple and wept at the graveside. Same man. Humble before his Father and unmovable in his purpose.

Which of these would make you harder to move — or harder to impress?

—

Save this and send it to the man who thinks humility is weakness.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #humility #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #christianity
